object_a.label: other
object_a.description: metal lever door handle on interior door
object_a.long_form_open_description: Dark metal lever-style door handle mounted on the right interior door at standard height; horizontal lever with a curved end and a round rosette, contrasting with the white door.
object_a.location_relative_to_other_objects: Mounted on the interior door, roughly level with the thermostat to its left
